props.ChoiceText: Discipline restored order but left bruises in memory, and not all obedience afterwards came from agreement.
props.ChoiceBio: Harsh discipline taught you how readily order can disguise resentment when it succeeds.

0.TransitionText: Because harsh discipline taught you how readily order can disguise resentment when it succeeds, church office remained your daily craft.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Prelate, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TargetText: Someone corrected under your hand still remembers whether they feared or respected you more.
